title: Zara Larsson: Midnight Sun Tour 2026
description: Swedish pop star Zara Larsson brings her Midnight Sun Tour to historic Tabernacle. Perfect for couples who love pop music and a lively atmosphere. The venue offers great sightlines and sound throughout.

title: The Format with Ben Kweller
description: Indie rock treat at The Eastern. The Format reunites with Ben Kweller for an intimate night of alternative hits. Great vibes and less crowded than amphitheater shows.

title: ATL Blues Festival - Blues Is Alright Tour
description: The 20th Annual ATL Blues Festival featuring the Blues Is Alright Tour. Smooth blues under the stars at the beautiful Cobb Energy Centre. Perfect sophisticated date night.

title: Atlanta One Love Reggae Music Fest
location: Shirley Clarke Franklin Park (Birth of Atlanta Lot)
description: Outdoors reggae festival perfect for couples! Enjoy island vibes, food vendors, and community atmosphere. Bring a blanket and enjoy an afternoon-evening of reggae under the sky.

title: Gordon Parks Exhibit at Jackson Fine Art
description: Celebrating 70th anniversary of Gordon Parks' iconic Life magazine photo essay. Stunning black and white photography documenting the Jim Crow South. Intellectually stimulating date activity.

title: To Be Continued - Artist Talk by Juan Miguel Palacios
description: Solo exhibition artist talk at elegant Luca Fine Art. Engage with contemporary art together and meet the artist. Intimate setting perfect for couples who appreciate culture.

title: Absurdity Community Exhibition
description: Group exhibition exploring absurdism in contemporary art. Extended run through early May - great to pair with a Decatur dinner date.

title: Vegan Nights ATL: Taste the City
description: Atlanta's ultimate vegan food event! Sample from multiple vendors, discover new plant-based spots, great drinks. Fun and delicious date night for foodie couples.

title: Vegan Soul Sunday
description: Free vegan community event happening TODAY! Earth-friendly eating celebration. Check website for this week's specific location.

title: Atlanta VegWeek 2026
description: Citywide celebration of plant-powered eating! Restaurants across Atlanta offer special vegan menus. Great opportunity to explore new spots together.

title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase
description: Top Atlanta comedians in one show! Laughing Skull Lounge is intimate and has a great bar. Must be 21+. Perfect for couples who love to laugh together.

title: The Classic Improvisational Show
description: Award-winning improv comedy at Atlanta's nonprofit improv theater. Interactive show - couples can participate! Different show every time, never the same experience twice.

title: Helium Presents: Guy Torry
description: Guy Torry (American Comedy Award winner, actor) headlines Helium. Full restaurant and bar, excellent sightlines. Weekend shows perfect for date night.

title: Ritmos Del Barrio ft. Salsa Sheila
location: Elements Dance Studio, North Druid Hills
description: Salsa and Latin dancing all night! Beginner lesson included usually. Dance the night away with your partner. Great energy, DJ playing reggaeton, salsa, bachata.

title: TUMBAO Dance Social - April Edition
description: Two rooms: one salsa, one bachata! Atlanta's premier Latin dance social. Great way to learn or show off your moves together. Couples discount sometimes available.

title: Latin Night Saturday Alpharetta
description: Suburban Latin dance night at local favorite bar. Less crowded, more intimate than city venues. Great for couples in north metro Atlanta.
